metadata.description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins for product management workflows

plugins.name: analyze-competitor
plugins.description: Competitive analysis with feature comparison, pricing research, and market positioning

plugins.name: analyze-metrics
plugins.description: Product metrics analysis for usage, adoption, conversion, retention, and revenue data

plugins.name: analyze-research
plugins.description: User research synthesis from interviews, transcripts, and feedback

plugins.name: build-prototype
plugins.description: React/TypeScript prototype builder from PRDs using Shadcn/ui

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Conventional commits with emoji prefixes and smart message formatting

plugins.name: create-pr
plugins.description: Pull request creation with comprehensive summary and test plan

plugins.name: daily-pulse
plugins.description: Morning briefing combining calendar agenda with task priorities

plugins.name: push
plugins.description: Push to remote with upstream tracking and force-push safety checks

plugins.name: sync-granola-meetings
plugins.description: Sync Granola meetings to local meetings folder with transcripts and metadata

plugins.name: translate-i18n
plugins.description: English-French translation with Canadian French and OQLF compliance

plugins.name: weekly-recap
plugins.description: Executive-ready weekly recap structured around key initiatives

plugins.name: weekly-review
plugins.description: Weekly review with goal progress, blockers, and next week planning

plugins.name: write-comms
plugins.description: Internal communications: status reports, newsletters, and stakeholder updates

plugins.name: write-dev-docs
plugins.description: Developer documentation: API references, guides, and Postman collections

plugins.name: write-doc
plugins.description: Product documents: PRDs, specs, briefs, user stories, and decision docs

plugins.name: write-ux-copy
plugins.description: UX copy for buttons, errors, tooltips, notifications, and onboarding
